steps.title: Client added and status set to Signed
steps.description: Onboarding run auto-created from the Medium Enterprise template. Ops Manager notified via FinChat.

steps.title: Ops Manager assigns team
steps.description: Assign the Account Manager, Senior Accountant and Junior Accountant from the org chart. On confirm, the run moves to Active.

steps.title: Scope confirmation auto-sent
steps.description: Plain-English scope email sent to the client from the Finanshels address — services signed, timeline, who their AM is.

steps.title: Drive folder auto-created
steps.description: Full client folder structure created in the assigned member's Drive. Monthly subfolders auto-created as months progress.

steps.title: System pre-fills intake form from CRM
steps.description: Each pre-filled field is flagged: pre-filled from CRM — confirm or correct. Empty fields shown for the AM to complete.

steps.title: AM reviews, edits and approves form
steps.description: AM reviews every field, corrects wrong data, fills what they know. On approval the magic link is generated.

steps.title: Magic link dispatched to client
steps.description: 7-day magic link sent to the client's primary contact, locked to that email. Opens the welcome video and pre-filled form.

steps.title: AM reviews submitted data
steps.description: Client confirms the form and uploads documents. AM reviews the submission and flags anything that needs clarification before Stage 4.

steps.title: AI pre-call brief generated
steps.description: AI generates a pre-call brief from CRM data, the intake form and any Fathom calls: business overview, industry context, UAE regulatory requirements, key questions, risk flags, COA recommendation.

steps.title: AM reviews AI brief
steps.description: AM reads and edits the brief, adds internal notes, then approves.

steps.title: COA template auto-selected
steps.description: System recommends a COA template from industry + structure + VAT status + revenue channels.

steps.title: Senior Accountant adjusts COA
steps.description: Senior Accountant reviews the template and makes client-specific adjustments, documenting any non-standard accounts.

steps.title: Agenda auto-generated and sent
steps.description: Kickoff agenda populated from the brief and emailed to the client.

steps.title: Fathom recordings linked
steps.description: Fathom recordings and notes auto-linked to the client playbook in Cadence.

steps.title: Call scheduled
steps.description: AM enters the date and time; the scheduling link is sent to the client.

steps.title: Kickoff call conducted
steps.description: Strategic conversation — logistics already handled. Fathom records the call automatically.

steps.title: Post-call structured notes submitted
steps.description: Structured notes: decisions, scope confirmed, COA adjustments, action items, go-live date. Action items auto-convert to tasks; due dates back-calculate from go-live.

steps.title: Welcome email auto-drafted
steps.description: Draft uses client name, AM, agreed services and timeline. AM reviews and sends in one click.

steps.title: COA sent to client for review
steps.description: Client sees a plain-English version of the COA via magic link and can comment per section.

steps.title: Client signs off COA
steps.description: Client confirms or requests changes. Step stays open until the client confirms.

steps.title: Client playbook finalised
steps.description: Playbook compiled from CRM data + intake form + Fathom notes + post-call notes. AM confirms it is complete.

steps.title: Project configured
steps.description: Project name, description and target go-live date (pre-filled from call notes).

steps.title: Task list auto-generated from template
steps.description: Tasks loaded per signed service (bookkeeping / VAT / CT / catch-up / CFO). VAT & CT deadlines auto-calculated; due dates back-calculated from go-live.

steps.title: Team configures tasks
steps.description: For each task: title, description, assignee, due date and client-visible toggle. Assignees notified via FinChat.

steps.title: Assignees and due dates set
steps.description: System enforces that every task has an assignee and a due date before handover unlocks.

steps.title: Task board reviewed and locked
steps.description: AM reviews the full board and locks it for handover.

steps.title: Handover checklist auto-generated
steps.description: Standard checklist: COA signed off, documents filed, playbook complete, task board complete, regular team assigned, Fathom linked, open items documented, engagement letter signed.

steps.title: AM completes checklist
steps.description: Each item confirmed individually. Cannot complete with any mandatory item outstanding.

steps.title: Handover summary PDF auto-generated
steps.description: Client overview, COA summary, contacts, timeline, open items and all links.

steps.title: Regular team notified
steps.description: FinChat briefing to all assigned regular team members with the handover PDF, playbook and Drive links.

steps.title: Regular team confirms receipt
steps.description: Assigned Senior Accountant confirms receipt — one click, cannot be skipped.

steps.title: Run close sequence
steps.description: CRM tag → Active, task board pushed to PMS, onboarding portal → You Are Live, Drive access shared, recurring runs created, VAT/CT deadlines added.
